text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, March 22. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Planning a street block party soon. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Catan is always a good time. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan's team played a match and won 4-3! The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Busy day for sports! What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: The lawn mower is having issues starting. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Automations are great when they work. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that putting together our grocery list. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Yum, that sounds delicious! Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Neighborhood connections are fun. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that listening to a podcast in the garage. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Great progress. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. That sounds like a sweet moment. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: The lawn mower is having issues starting. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Good call on checking that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that putting together our grocery list. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. I've got the grocery list ready. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
